sample_prompts: make the head a bit smaller relative to the body without rebuilding the model
repair the relative proportion drift with a bounded scale change
reduce the head size a little to better match the creature side reference
adjust the paw size relative to the body without rebuilding the mesh
repair the ear or snout proportion drift with a bounded macro change
napraw proporcje między częściami bez przebudowy modelu
skoryguj proporcję jednego elementu względem drugiego
description: Bounded macro that repairs cross-object proportion drift with an explicit target ratio and a bounded scale adjustment. It verifies the current ratio, scales one target object within a max delta, and re-checks the result with scene_assert_proportion.
